name: samseg_long
description: SAMSEG longitudinal segmentation via niwrap: one script runs either mri_robust_template (BIDS T1w -> unbiased template) or run_samseg_long (template-space images -> longitudinal segmentation), selected by the TOOL argument. One call per participant; sessions auto-discovered.

inputs.name: script_path
inputs.description: Path to the script to run (shipped inside the pipeline bundle).

inputs.name: tool
inputs.description: Which tool to run: mri_robust_template or run_samseg_long.

inputs.name: input_dir
inputs.description: Input root: BIDS dir for mri_robust_template; step-1 output dir for run_samseg_long.

inputs.name: participant_id
inputs.description: Participant label, with or without the sub- prefix.
